r 7'7'

* MIN<(E₂)> GIM PIŠ₁₀.d[ID₂] [...]

r 8'8'

* MIN<(E₂)> GIM I₃.NUN.NA NIG₂.ŠU x [...]

r 9'9'

* MIN<(E₂)> GIM ŠIM uš-ta-[maṭ-ṭa] x [...]
